message:
🐛 Fix WebSocket connection attempts in local demo mode (#437)

The useActiveUsers hook was using isDemoModeForced instead of
getDemoMode() when deciding whether to use HTTP heartbeat vs
WebSocket for presence tracking.

This caused WebSocket connection errors in Chrome console when
running locally with demo mode enabled (not on Netlify), since
there's no backend server to connect to.

Fix: Check both isDemoModeForced and getDemoMode() to skip
WebSocket connection in all demo mode scenarios.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
